TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Lavulan = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang Lavulan. 81 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 222 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 99% niqan 219 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 1% niqan 3 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 96%, Tayal 0.5%, Rukai 0.5%, Puyuma 0.5%, Paiwan 0.5%, ni rahuq na o 0.5%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = la*ulan = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu tawjunʦju ka alaŋ la*ulan. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, tajal *.*%, ɾukai *.*%, pujuma *.*%, paiwan *.*%, ni ɾaħuq na o *.*%. pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: = Lavulan = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang Lavulan. 81 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 222 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 99% niqan 219 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 1% niqan 3 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 96%, Tayal 0.5%, Rukai 0.5%, Puyuma 0.5%, Paiwan 0.5%, ni rahuq na o 0.5%. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = la*ulan = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu tawjunʦju ka alaŋ la*ulan. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan * ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, tajal *.*%, ɾukai *.*%, pujuma *.*%, paiwan *.*%, ni ɾaħuq na o *.*%. pnjaħan pnatas
